svg.title: Preclinical Study Simulator — hybrid architecture diagram
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: user input layer at top, processing layer in middle, output layer at bottom, with Claude AI and OSPSuite.R as parallel processing engines.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should I design the free-text study description input in Shiny?')
sendPrompt('What structured parameters should the Shiny form include for PBPK setup?')
sendPrompt('What file types should the app accept for compound data upload?')
sendPrompt('How does the Shiny server.R route between Claude and OSPSuite.R?')
sendPrompt('How do I call the Anthropic API from R using httr2 for parameter parsing?')
sendPrompt('How do I run a PBPK simulation programmatically using OSPSuite.R?')
sendPrompt('How should I build the concentration-time plotly chart in Shiny?')
sendPrompt('How do I generate NCA summary tables in R from OSPSuite.R output?')
sendPrompt('What should Claudes narrative summary of PBPK results include?')
sendPrompt('How do I export the simulation results as a Word or PDF report from Shiny?')
